SuiteLens
by Adaptive Solutions Group
VS Code Extension

Review SuiteScript
without leaving your editor.

Highlight code. Click Review. Get production-focused findings on governance risks, performance anti-patterns, and scalability failures — in seconds. No API key required.

Install from MarketplaceView on GitHub
SuiteLens Review — afterSubmit.js
SuiteLens ReviewCRITICAL RISK

This UserEvent script has 3 critical issues that will fail in production, 2 warnings, 1 suggestion.

CRITICALRecord Load Inside Loop
Line 24
CRITICALAPI Call Inside Loop (N+1)
Line 15
CRITICALHTTP Calls in User Event
Line 7
WARNINGFull Record Save for Field Update
Line 44
WARNINGHardcoded Internal IDs
Line 30
SUGGESTIONUnnecessary Dynamic Mode
Line 24

Real output from SuiteLens static analysis — no API key needed

Three steps. Zero context-switching.

1

Highlight your code

Select a SuiteScript block — a function, a full file, or just the lines you're worried about.

2

Right-click → Review

Click "SuiteLens: Review Selected Code" from the context menu, or use the Command Palette.

3

Get findings instantly

A side panel shows risk level, categorized findings with evidence, and concrete recommendations.

Not a wrapper around AI.

SuiteLens has a real static analysis engine. It parses your code into an AST and runs 10 production-focused rules — offline, instantly, with zero API calls. AI enhancement is optional, for when you want deeper architectural feedback.

STATIC ENGINE (always on)

  • AST parsing via acorn
  • 10 rule checks with real detection logic
  • Works offline — no API key needed
  • Instant results, zero cost
  • Inline editor diagnostics

AI LAYER (opt-in)

  • Enhances static findings — never replaces
  • Catches architectural misfit
  • Business logic risk analysis
  • Uses your own Anthropic API key
  • Claude Sonnet or Haiku

What SuiteLens catches

Governance Risk

record.load() in loops, governance exhaustion patterns, API calls that blow limits at production volume.

Performance

N+1 search patterns, unbounded result sets, heavy User Event logic that blocks saves and frustrates users.

Reliability

Missing idempotency on record creation, scripts that create duplicates on retry, no error handling on API calls.

Security

Hardcoded internal IDs that break across environments, credential exposure, unsafe patterns.

Architecture

Wrong script type for the job, heavy processing in User Events, logic that belongs in Map/Reduce.

Anti-Patterns

Full record save where submitFields works, unnecessary dynamic mode, patterns that pass QA and fail at scale.

Setup in 60 seconds

1

Install the extension

Search "SuiteLens" in VS Code Extensions, or install from the Marketplace link above.

2

Start reviewing

Highlight SuiteScript code, right-click, choose "SuiteLens: Review Selected Code." Static analysis runs instantly — no setup needed.

3

Optional: Enable AI

For deeper analysis, add your Anthropic API key in VS Code Settings → SuiteLens. Get a key

Install SuiteLens — Free

Static analysis works out of the box. No API key required.
